name: Adwi — E2E Auto Loop
notes: Adwi E2E Auto Loop workflow. Import: n8n Settings → Workflows → Import from file. Prerequisites: ADWI_LOCAL_SECRET must be set in n8n Settings → Environment variables. The start route uses Popen — returns job_id in <1s. The status route reads status.json. Do NOT log X-Adwi-Secret values. Webhook URLs after import: POST http://<n8n-host>:5678/webhook/adwi-e2e-auto-loop (start), POST http://<n8n-host>:5678/webhook/adwi-e2e-auto-loop-status (status check).
